name: API Test Order - dotnet-integration (Multi-Model Agent)
_readme: SETUP: 1) Import this file into n8n. 2) Create 3 credentials: openAiApi, anthropicApi, googlePalmApi. 3) Assign each to the matching Chat Model node. 4) Activate. Send payload with optional 'model' field: 'gpt-4o' | 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022' | 'gemini-1.5-pro'.
